query: Get top spending publishers and their product mix, then assess negotiation leverage for each.

step_1_sql.query: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT product) AS product_count FROM consumption_facts WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10

step_2_consumer.task: Assess each publisher's negotiation leverage: high if product_count > 3 and spend > $100k, medium if product_count 2-3, low otherwise
